meta.title: About idcd — Global Network Diagnostics Platform
meta.description: idcd is a professional multi-node network diagnostics platform offering global probing, DNS/SSL/IP lookups, and one-click diagnostics.

hero.title: About idcd
hero.subtitle: A professional multi-node network diagnostics platform — making network quality visible, measurable, and trustworthy.

global.title: Global Node Coverage
global.description: Probe nodes distributed worldwide deliver true user-perspective network quality data.

diagnostics.title: Real-time Diagnostics
diagnostics.description: Ping, HTTP, TCP, traceroute, DNS, SSL certificate checks and more diagnostic tools.

evidence.title: Evidence Service
evidence.description: KMS-signed Verdict reports provide verifiable network quality evidence for compliance audits.

intro.title: Overview
intro.p1: idcd is a professional network diagnostics and monitoring platform that delivers global multi-node probing services for developers, SRE teams, and enterprises.

probe.label: Multi-node probing
probe.desc: — Launch network diagnostics from many geographies simultaneously for a complete view of network quality.

tools.label: Rich diagnostic toolset
tools.desc: — Ping, HTTP probing, TCP connection tests, traceroute, DNS lookups, SSL cert checks, and more.

monitor.label: Real-time monitoring
monitor.desc: — Create scheduled monitoring tasks that automatically check service availability and performance.

diagnose.label: One-click diagnostics
diagnose.desc: — Run a comprehensive network health report in a single click.

evidence.label: Evidence service
evidence.desc: — KMS-signed Verdict reports give publicly verifiable network quality evidence.

utils.label: Developer utilities
utils.desc: — JSON formatter, regex tester, Base64 codec, timestamp converter, CIDR calculator, and more.

intro.p3: Whether you're monitoring global CDN performance, verifying SLA compliance, troubleshooting network outages, or needing trusted network quality evidence, idcd has you covered.

tech.title: Architecture
tech.p1: idcd is built on a modern technology stack designed for high performance, availability, and great UX:

backend.label: Backend
backend.desc: — Go, delivering high-performance APIs and the probing engine.

frontend.label: Frontend
frontend.desc: — Next.js (App Router) + TypeScript + shadcn/ui for a polished UI.

cache.label: Cache
cache.desc: — Redis 7, used for sessions and high-frequency query optimization.

security.label: Security
security.desc: — KMS signing, TLS 1.3 in transit, and defense in depth.

nodes.label: Node management
nodes.desc: — Globally distributed probe nodes with horizontal scaling.

tech.p2: The whole system follows microservice principles: clear module boundaries, easy to maintain and extend.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.footer: Reach us by email or via GitHub Issues — for product feedback, feature requests, or technical support. We'd love to hear from you.
